subcodes.first_line: O ye ardent admirers of the Luminary of the horizons and steadfast ones in the Covenant! His honor Ḥaydar-'Alí, upon him be the Glory of God, wrote [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیدائیان نیر آفاق و ثابتان بر میثاق جناب حیدر علی علیه بهاء الله نامه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @Declaration; advent of the Bab
